steps.title: Identify what would contradict the setup
steps.content: The student expected the two mycorrhizal hosts to benefit substantially from fungi while the non-mycorrhizal species (broccoli) would not benefit or be harmed. The surprising finding would be data that contradicts this prior knowledge.

steps.title: Find which data point contradicts expectations
steps.content:
Broccoli (non-mycorrhizal) with fungi measured 7.5 g versus 7 g without fungi—a slight benefit from fungi despite being a non-host.

This contradicts the expectation that non-hosts don't benefit from mycorrhizal fungi and would genuinely surprise the student.

The other choices either describe expected results (B: hosts outperforming non-hosts; C: hosts benefiting substantially) or misstate the data (D claims corn was highest in treated soil when broccoli actually was).

That confirms A is correct.
